name: EcoClaw Runtime Optimizer
description: Token-efficiency runtime plugin for OpenClaw with pluggable routing and optimization hooks.
author: EcoClaw

proxyBaseUrl.description: Optional OpenAI-compatible proxy base URL for routing (for example: http://127.0.0.1:8787/v1).

proxyApiKey.description: Optional API key used with proxyBaseUrl.

debugTapProviderTraffic.description: Debug only: tap outbound provider fetch requests/responses and write JSONL records.

debugTapPath.description: Path for provider traffic tap JSONL output.

proxyAutostart.description: Autostart embedded responses proxy when plugin starts.

modules.description: Module-level switches for ablation and controlled experiments.

eviction.description: Enable eviction execution module interface (currently noop scaffold).

compaction.description: Compaction and summary controls for the proxy runtime pipeline.

autoForkOnPolicy.description: Apply generated compaction plans by forking a new physical session branch.

summaryMaxOutputTokens.description: Max output tokens for summary sidecar generation.

summaryPrompt.description: Inline summary prompt override used by the summary module.

summaryPromptPath.description: Path to a custom summary prompt file.

resumePrefixPrompt.description: Inline resume-prefix prompt override used when seeding compacted branches.

resumePrefixPromptPath.description: Path to a custom resume-prefix prompt file.

compactionCooldownTurns.description: Cooldown turns after a compaction request before another request is allowed.

turnLocalCompaction.description: Turn-local compaction settings for archiving tool results that have been consumed by subsequent writes.

archiveDir.description: Directory to store archived tool results.

handoff.description: Task handoff generation controls for future sub-agent or continuation workflows.

handoffMaxOutputTokens.description: Max output tokens for handoff sidecar generation.

handoffPrompt.description: Inline handoff prompt override used by the handoff module.

handoffPromptPath.description: Path to a custom handoff prompt file.

handoffCooldownTurns.description: Cooldown turns after a handoff request before another request is allowed.

eviction.description: Eviction policy interface scaffold. Current runtime behavior is noop; fields are reserved for upcoming eviction implementations.

maxCandidateBlocks.description: Reserved upper bound for candidate blocks when eviction planner is enabled.

minBlockChars.description: Reserved minimum chars for a message/block to be considered by eviction planner.

semanticReduction.description: Optional semantic LLMLingua2 reduction settings for after-call compression.

pythonBin.description: Python executable used to run the LLMLingua2 worker.

llmlinguaModelPath.description: Local path to the LLMLingua2 token-classification model.

targetRatio.description: Target semantic keep ratio between 0.05 and 0.95.

minInputChars.description: Minimum response length before semantic reduction is attempted.

minSavedChars.description: Minimum saved characters required to accept semantic reduction.

preselectRatio.description: Chunk preselection ratio before LLMLingua2 compression.

maxChunkChars.description: Chunk size used by semantic reduction worker.

modelPath.description: Local path to the embedding model when provider=local.

apiBaseUrl.description: OpenAI-compatible embeddings base URL when provider=api.

apiKey.description: API key for embeddings when provider=api.

reduction.description: Reduction engine controls for proxy execution path.

engine.description: Reduction delegates pass execution to layers/execution pipeline.

triggerMinChars.description: Minimum chars to trigger reduction candidate generation in proxy bridge path.

maxToolChars.description: Target max chars for tool payload trim in layered reduction engine.
